'''tapoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiodiscrimination|enantiodiscrimination]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiodiscrimination|enantiodiscrimination]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tapoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpeteth|tæpeteth]] || [[word:tæpetej|tæpetej]] || [[word:tæpetesh|tæpetesh]] || [[word:tæpete|tæpete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapopototh|tapopototh]] || [[word:tapopotoj|tapopotoj]] || [[word:tapopotosh|tapopotosh]] || [[word:tapopoto|tapopoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tapototh|tapototh]] || [[word:tapotoj|tapotoj]] || [[word:tapotosh|tapotosh]] || [[word:tapoto|tapoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapoftoth|tapoftoth]] || [[word:tapoftoj|tapoftoj]] || [[word:tapoftosh|tapoftosh]] || [[word:tapoftof|tapoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tapototho|tapototho]] || [[word:tapotojo|tapotojo]] || [[word:tapotosho|tapotosho]] || [[word:tapotoko|tapotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tapototh|tapototh]] || [[word:tapotoj|tapotoj]] || [[word:tapotosh|tapotosh]] || [[word:tapoto|tapoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tapotothol|tapotothol]] || [[word:tapotojol|tapotojol]] || [[word:tapotoshol|tapotoshol]] || [[word:tapotokol|tapotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tapotothotho|tapotothotho]] || [[word:tapotojojo|tapotojojo]] || [[word:tapotoshosho|tapotoshosho]] || [[word:tapotoko|tapotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tapotothon|tapotothon]] || [[word:tapotojon|tapotojon]] || [[word:tapotoshon|tapotoshon]] || [[word:tapotokon|tapotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tapotothoro|tapotothoro]] || [[word:tapotojoro|tapotojoro]] || [[word:tapotoshoro|tapotoshoro]] || [[word:tapotokoro|tapotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
